name: MoneyGram
description_short: MoneyGram is a global money transfer service with 3 locations in Sugar Land, TX, offering domestic and international money sending/receiving through partner retailers.
description_long:
MoneyGram is an established money transfer company that operates through a network of physical retail locations rather than as a standalone storefront. In Sugar Land, Texas, the company partners with major retailers including Walmart and CVS to provide accessible money transfer services to consumers.

MoneyGram's core offering includes sending and receiving money domestically and internationally. Customers can initiate transfers online or visit physical locations to complete transactions in person. The service integrates into existing retail footprints, making locations convenient for consumers who already shop at these establishments. In the Sugar Land area, MoneyGram maintains presence at three partner locations with varying hours of operation.

What distinguishes MoneyGram is its hybrid operational model combining online management with offline transaction capability. Customers have flexibility to initiate transfers through digital channels and complete them at physical locations, or vice versa. The partnership approach with major retailers means extended operating hours at some locations (until 10 PM at CVS) and geographic convenience across the region.

MoneyGram serves a practical but limited financial function within consumer banking needs. The service fills a niche for customers requiring immediate cash transfer capabilities without traditional bank accounts or for those sending money internationally. However, the company does not offer broader financial services, credit products, or wealth-building tools. Users should understand this is a transaction-focused service with associated fees typical of money transfer operators.
address: 5301 River Oaks Blvd, River Oaks, TX 76114

company_info.headquarters: 5301 River Oaks Blvd, River Oaks, TX 76114

pros: 3 convenient locations in Sugar Land area accessible through established retailers
Extended hours at some locations (CVS open until 10 PM)
Hybrid model allows online initiation with in-person completion for flexibility
Partner locations include major chains (Walmart, CVS) already frequented by consumers
Offers both domestic and international money transfer options
No requirement for traditional bank account to use services
Ability to manage transfers online or offline based on customer preference
cons: Limited to 3 locations in Sugar Land area, requiring travel to partner retailers
Money transfer services typically carry transaction fees not disclosed on this location page
No standalone MoneyGram office; dependent on retail partner hours and policies
Website provides no pricing transparency or fee structure information
Does not offer other financial services (lending, credit building, account products)
best_for: Consumers without bank accounts needing to send or receive money quickly
Individuals sending money internationally to family or contacts abroad
People already shopping at Walmart or CVS who need convenient money transfer access
Those requiring in-person transaction verification rather than purely digital transfers
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers needing to send or receive money domestically or internationally with same-day access. The main caveat is that this is purely a transaction service with no broader financial benefits, and users should expect standard money transfer fees typical of the industry.
